    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    OGL11Graphics.setTextureWrapping(TextureTargetType target, TextureWrapType wrapS)
    Sets the current wrapping for the current texture bound to the specified target.
    void
    OGL11Graphics.setTextureWrapping(TextureTargetType target, TextureWrapType wrapS, TextureWrapType wrapT)
    Sets the current wrapping for the current texture bound to the specified target.
    void

    Sets the current wrapping for the current texture bound to the specified target.

    Description

    OGL33Graphics.setSamplerWrapR(OGLSampler sampler, TextureWrapType wrapType)
    Sets the R-coordinate wrapping for a sampler.
    void

    Sets the S-coordinate wrapping for a sampler.
    void

    Sets the T-coordinate wrapping for a sampler.
